entries.source: Our Policy on “Do Not Track” Signals:
entries.value: Aming Polisiya sa “Gawin Hindi Track” Signals:

entries.source: Our Service allows you to post, link, store, share and otherwise make available certain information, text, graphics, videos, or other material (“Content”). You are responsible for Content that you post on or through Service, including its legality, reliability, and appropriateness. By posting Content on or through Service, You represent and warrant that: (i) Content is yours (you own it) and/or you have the right to use it and the right to grant us the rights and license as provided in these Terms, and (ii) that the posting of your Content on or through Service does not violate the privacy rights, publicity rights, copyrights, contract rights or any other rights of any person or entity. We reserve the right to terminate the account of anyone found to be infringing on a copyright. You retain any and all of your rights to any Content you submit, post or display on or through Service and you are responsible for protecting those rights. We take no responsibility and assume no liability for Content you or any third party posts on or through Service. However, by posting Content using Service you grant us the right and license to use, modify, publicly perform, publicly display, reproduce, and distribute such Content on and through Service. You agree that this license includes the right for us to make your Content available to other users of Service, who may also use your Content subject to these Terms. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) has the right but not the obligation to monitor and edit all Content provided by users. In addition, Content found on or through this Service are the property of Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) or used with permission. You may not distribute, modify, transmit, reuse, download, repost, copy, or use said Content, whether in whole or in part, for commercial purposes or for personal gain, without express advance written permission from us.
entries.value: Aming Serbisyo pinapayagan ikaw sa post, link, imbakin, share at otherwise Gumawa ng available certain impormasyon, text, graphics, videos, o other material (“Content”). Ikaw ay responsable para sa Content na ikaw post sa o sa pamamagitan ng Serbisyo, including nito legality, reliability, at appropriateness. Ng posting Content sa o sa pamamagitan ng Serbisyo, Ikaw represent at warrant na: (ako) Content ay iyo (ikaw own ito) at/or ikaw mayroon ang tama gamitin ito at ang tama sa grant amin ang mga karapatan at license bilang ibinigay sa mga ito Terms, at (ii) na ang posting iyong Content sa o sa pamamagitan ng Serbisyo ginagawa hindi violate ang privacy mga karapatan, publicity mga karapatan, copyrights, contract mga karapatan o anumang other mga karapatan ng anumang tao o entity. Inilalaan namin ang karapatan sa wakasan ang account ng anyone found sa maging infringing sa isang copyright. Ikaw panatilihin anumang at lahat ng iyong mga karapatan sa anumang Content ikaw submit, post o display sa o sa pamamagitan ng Serbisyo at ikaw ay responsable para sa protecting mga iyon mga karapatan. However, ng posting Content gamit ang Serbisyo ikaw grant amin ang tama at license gamitin, modify, publicly perform, publicly display, reproduce, at ipamahagi such Content sa at sa pamamagitan ng Serbisyo. Ikaw sumasang-ayon na ito license kasama ang tama para sa amin gumawa iyong Content available sa other mga user ng Serbisyo, sino may also Gamitin iyong Content paksa mga ito Terms. Great Indian Kompanya (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) mayroon ang tama pero hindi ang obligasyon subaybayan at i-edit lahat Content ibinigay ng mga user. Sa addition, Content found sa o sa pamamagitan ng ito Serbisyo ay ang property ng Great Indian Kompanya (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) o ginamit kasama ang permission. Ikaw may hindi ipamahagi, modify, transmit, reuse, download, repost, copy, o Gamitin said Content, kung sa whole o sa part, para sa commercial mga layunin o para sa personal gain, nang walang express advance written permission mula sa amin.

We strongly advise you to review the Privacy Policy of every site you visit. We assume no responsibility for the content, privacy policies or practices of any third party sites or services.

entries.source: Philosophy Lab

entries.source: Philosophy Lab AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Explore identity, knowledge, fairness, freedom, happiness, and other deep questions through careful reasoning.
entries.value: Philosophy Lab Mode ng pag-aaral gamit ang AI ay isang nakapokus way gamitin AI para sa pag-aaral instead ng pasibo sagot koleksyon. Ang mode ay ginawa sa paligid ng isang tiyak gawain: Galugarin ang identity, kaalaman, pagiging patas, kalayaan, happiness, at other deep mga tanong sa pamamagitan ng careful pangangatwiran.

entries.source: Pick any topic and face a focused 10-question multiple-choice quiz. You answer one question at a time, get instant feedback, and finish with a score and review.
entries.value: Pumili ng anumang paksa at sumabak sa isang nakapokus na 10-tanong na multiple-choice quiz. Sasagot ka ng isa-isa, makakakuha ng agarang feedback, at magtatapos nang may marka at pagsusuri.

entries.source: Pick any topic and go head-to-head in a real debate. Choose a side, get challenged, and learn to make better arguments.

entries.source: Practice Test Builder
entries.value: Tagabuo ng Pagsusulit na Pagsasanay

entries.source: Practice the final claim aloud until it feels owned.
entries.value: Magsanay ng ang huli pahayag aloud until ito feels owned.

entries.source: Practice tough real-life conversations
entries.value: Magsanay sa mahihirap na pag-uusap sa totoong buhay

entries.source: Practice tough real-life conversations.
entries.value: Magsanay ng tough real-life conversations.

entries.source: Practice transfer. Ask for a similar problem with different numbers, wording, or context.
entries.value: Magsanay ng ilipat. Humingi ng isang similar problema kasama ang different numbers, wording, o konteksto.

entries.source: Practice viva, oral exams, project defenses, and rapid follow-up questions with calm feedback.
entries.value: Magsanay para sa viva, oral exam, depensa ng proyekto, at mabilis na follow-up na tanong na may mahinahong feedback.

entries.source: Practice, not answer-copying
entries.value: Pagsasanay, hindi pangongopya ng sagot

entries.source: Practise inside the lesson
entries.value: Magsanay sa loob ng aralin

entries.source: Practise recall
entries.value: Magsanay sa pag-alala

entries.source: Practise retrieval before rereading
entries.value: Magsanay ng retrieval bago muling magbasa

entries.source: Practise saying it
entries.value: Magsanay saying ito

entries.source: Predict grades and plan score targets
entries.value: Mag-predict ng mga grado at magplano ng mga target na marka

entries.source: Predict what the code or data should do before asking for help.
entries.value: Predict ano ang code o data dapat gawin bago pagtatanong para sa tulong.

entries.source: Predict what the code or data should do before asking.
entries.value: Predict ano ang code o data dapat gawin bago pagtatanong.

entries.source: Predict, explain, test mentally or safely, and reflect on evidence.
entries.value: Predict, ipaliwanag, Subukan ang mentally o safely, at reflect sa ebidensya.

entries.source: Prefer lesson blocks, maps, simulations, contrast pairs, rubrics, and concise coach prompts over free-form lecture.
entries.value: Prefer lesson blocks, maps, simulations, contrast pairs, rubrics, at maikli coach mga prompt sa ibabaw ng free-form lecture.

entries.source: Prepare a deep work session with a clear outcome, constraints, focus rules, review checkpoint, and fallback plan.
entries.value: Maghanda ng sesyon ng deep work na may malinaw na resulta, mga limitasyon, mga panuntunan sa pokus, checkpoint ng pagsusuri, at planong reserba.

entries.source: Prepare clear forum questions, replies, summaries, and follow-up requests that make student discussions more useful.
entries.value: Maghanda ng malilinaw na tanong sa forum, mga sagot, buod, at mga follow-up request na nagpapahusay sa mga diskusyon ng mga mag-aaral.

entries.source: Prepare for an exam
entries.value: Maghanda para sa exam

entries.source: Prepare for an exam with active recall
entries.value: Maghanda para sa isang exam kasama ang aktibong pag-alala

entries.source: Prepare for oral questioning
entries.value: Maghanda para sa oral na pagsusulit

entries.source: Prepare for oral questioning.
entries.value: Maghanda para sa oral questioning.

entries.source: Prepare for school, internship, job, or scholarship interviews with realistic questions and feedback.
entries.value: Maghanda para sa mga interview sa paaralan, internship, trabaho, o scholarship gamit ang mga makatotohanang tanong at feedback.

entries.source: Prepare learners for oral exams through realistic questioning.
entries.value: Maghanda mga mag-aaral para sa oral mga exam sa pamamagitan ng realistic questioning.

entries.source: Prepare speeches, presentations, interviews, or oral exams with prompts, timing, and feedback on structure.
entries.value: Maghanda para sa mga talumpati, presentasyon, panayam, o oral exam gamit ang mga prompt, timing, at feedback sa estruktura.

entries.source: Prepare study resources for classmates or a group: summaries, links, notes, explanations, and usage guidance.
entries.value: Maghanda ng mga resource sa pag-aaral para sa mga kaklase o grupo: mga buod, link, tala, paliwanag, at gabay sa paggamit.

entries.source: Prepared courses, videos, and exercises are strongest when the learner knows the topic sequence.
entries.value: Prepared courses, videos, at exercises ay pinakamalakas kapag ang mag-aaral alam ang paksa sequence.

entries.source: Present an argument, wait for rebuttal, identify weak spots, and strengthen the learner's reasoning.
entries.value: Present isang argumento, wait para sa rebuttal, identify mahina spots, at strengthen ang mag-aaral's pangangatwiran.

entries.source: Present evidence, ask for decisions, reveal consequences, and debrief principles.
entries.value: Present ebidensya, Humingi ng decisions, reveal consequences, at debrief principles.

entries.source: Press facts
entries.value: Press mga katotohanan

entries.value: Primary madla

entries.value: Pangunahing nabigasyon

entries.source: Principles
entries.value: Principles

entries.source: Prioritize assignments
entries.value: Bigyang-priyoridad ang mga assignment

entries.source: Prioritize by urgency and effort, break tasks down, and update status.
entries.value: Prioritize ng urgency at effort, break mga gawain down, at update status.

entries.source: Prioritize topics
entries.value: Bigyang-prayoridad ang mga paksa

entries.source: Prioritize topics.
entries.value: Prioritize mga paksa.

entries.source: Prioritize, schedule, add practice and review, then adjust as progress changes.
entries.value: Prioritize, schedule, add Magsanay ng at repaso, pagkatapos adjust bilang progress changes.

entries.source: Prioritize, shrink oversized tasks, track progress, and close with a review.
entries.value: Prioritize, shrink oversized mga gawain, track progress, at close kasama ang isang repaso.

entries.source: Privacy
entries.value: Pagkapribado

entries.source: Privacy policy
entries.value: Privacy polisiya

entries.source: Privacy Policy
entries.value: Patakaran sa Privacy

entries.source: Privacy Policy | inspir
entries.value: Privacy Polisiya | inspir

entries.source: Private saved chat URLs are not sitemap-listed and are not included in llms.txt, llms-full.txt, or the JSON AI content catalog.
entries.value: Pribado saved chat URLs ay hindi sitemap-listed at ay hindi kasama sa llms.txt, llms-full.txt, o ang JSON AI content catalog.

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is not equally available. A free public AI learning platform can help reduce that access gap by giving more people a patient first place to learn.
entries.value: Pribado tutoring ay powerful, pero ito ay hindi equally available. Isang libre pampubliko Platform sa pag-aaral gamit ang AI Maaari bang tulong reduce na access gap ng giving mas marami mga tao isang patient una place matuto.

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is unevenly distributed. inspir uses AI to widen access while keeping the learner active: hints before answers, questions before lectures, and practice after explanation.
entries.value: Pribado tutoring ay powerful, pero ito ay unevenly distributed. inspir uses AI sa widen access habang keeping ang mag-aaral aktibo: mga hint bago mga sagot, mga tanong bago lectures, at Magsanay ng pagkatapos paliwanag.

entries.source: Project Coach
entries.value: Project Coach

entries.source: Project Coach AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Plan a school, creative, coding, or personal project with scope, milestones, blockers, and next actions.
entries.value: Proyekto Coach Mode ng pag-aaral gamit ang AI ay isang nakapokus way gamitin AI para sa pag-aaral instead ng pasibo sagot koleksyon. Ang mode ay ginawa sa paligid ng isang tiyak gawain: Magplano ng isang paaralan, creative, coding, o personal proyekto kasama ang scope, milestones, blockers, at susunod actions.

entries.source: Project Coach AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Proyekto Coach Mode ng pag-aaral gamit ang AI: praktikal gabay
